5 Reasons Why Over 168,000 Adults Are Getting the Best Sleep of Their Lives with This Grounding Sheet Technology

Discover the natural secret to eliminating chronic inflammation, pain and fatigue - without a single pill! 

"From the first night, the difference was AMAZING! I don't wake up with lower back or leg pain since I've started sleeping on these sheets!"

Amy G.

Why Terra Grounding Sheet users are raving:

1. They're finally sleeping through the night again.

The Terra Grounding Sheets contain a specialized silver wire that plugs into the Earth's natural electrical field. This gently grounds your body, allowing you to soak up the Earth's unlimited supply of anti-inflammatory electrons while you sleep. The result? Deeper, more restorative sleep that leaves you refreshed.

Maria H.

I'm in my sixties and in 2 nights, my aches and pains are all but gone. I'm sleeping much better, and even notice positive changes in my skin.

2. They're waking up pain-free for the first time in years.

The Earth's surface is bursting with potent antioxidant electrons that neutralize inflammation. By reconnecting you to this natural energy source, the Terra Grounding Sheets help eliminate the chronic inflammation at the root of joint pain, muscle stiffness and countless other health issues.

3. Their energy levels are through the roof.

Think of your body like a battery. Our modern lifestyles slowly drain us of the Earth's revitalizing electrical charge. But the Terra Grounding Sheets allow you to recharge your battery back to full power each night. You'll wake up with the boundless energy of your 20-year-old self again!

Nicole S.

As someone who struggles with chronic back pain, I'm always looking for ways to get better sleep. After about 5 days of using these grounding sheets, I realized I was tossing and turning less during the night.

4. They're made with organic, eco-friendly materials.

No synthetic fabrics or mystery chemicals here. The Terra Grounding Sheets are made with 90% organic cotton and 10% medical-grade silver threading. It's a completely natural way to recapture your healthiest, most vibrant self.

5. There's zero risk to trying them out!

We're so confident the Terra Grounding Sheets will revolutionize your sleep, we offer a 30-day risk-free guarantee. If you don't experience the best sleep of your life, simply return them for a full refund. No questions asked.

FAQS

How long will a Terra Grounding Sheet last?

Terra Grounding Sheets are made with cotton, polyester, and conductive silver fibers. They can last as long as regular bed sheets. They withstand rigorous testing, showing virtually no wear after 100 wash cycles.

Can I wash the Terra Grounding Sheet like regular bredding?

Yes you can. Terra Grounding Sheets (just like regular bedding) can go on a gentle wash cycle with mild detergent. We recommend washing at or below 40C/ 104F on a medium to slow spin cycle.

Can I wash the Terra Grounding Sheet with bleach or fabric softener?

We recommend avoiding use of chlorine, bleach, or fabric softeners when washing the Terra Grounding Sheet.

Can I dry my Terra Grounding Sheet in a dryer?

Yes on a low spin cycle. However we recommend for longevity, air drying for best results.

Where is my plug?

The grounding plug is provided and is a singular prong - see product page for images.

Can I use Terra Grounding Sheet with pets?

Yes, the Terra Grounding Sheets are safe for use around pets.

Is it safe to use a Terra Grounding Sheet over an eletric blanket?

Yes, Terra Grounding Sheets are safe to use with electric blankets as they don't interfere with the blanket's operation.

Can I plug my Terra Grounding Sheet protector or extension cord?

Yes, you can plug your Terra Grounding Sheet into a surge protector or extension cord if they have a ground port (3rd prong) for proper grounding.

Can I plug my Terra Grounding Sheet into a surge protector or extension cord?

Even short periods of grounding, such as while sleeping, can provide benefits. There's no need to be grounded all day. The effects of grounding is as individual as the person using it.

Do you ship Worldwide?

The Grounding Co provides Free Worldwide Shipping to our customers! We ship to most countries worldwide* *Shipments to the military area and some small countries may incur delays.

How long does shipping take?

We offer several different methods of shipping.
Free Tracked Shipping 7-10 business days
Secure Tracked Shipping 5-8 business days
Express Tracked Shipping 1-3 Business days

During peak sales periods shipping times may change*.
*For more details: shipping policy.

I made a mistake on my shipping address, can I change it?

You can change your shipping address within 12 hours. Make sure to contact us immediately with your order number, and the correct address. The more information you provide, the sooner we can change your information. Although we cannot guarantee that we'll catch your order in time before it enters processing, we will try our absolute best to make the requested changes. Make sure you type 'Urgent: Change Order Details' in the subject line. Any other title may cause delay in the delivery of your order. If your order is dispatched you will need to contact the courier/ postal service directly to advise them of the change of address.

Will I get a tracking number after making an order?

Yes! All orders will include a tracking number. It will automatically be sent to your email. You can track your order directly at our site by clicking here. If you received a shipping confirmation email with your tracking number, it means that your order has been shipped. Tracking numbers can take 2-5 business days to update depending on the shipping carrier. This is usually due to our high volume of orders.

How do I track my order?

As soon as your package is shipped, you will receive an email notification confirming the shipment. The email will provide you with the tracking number for your package and a link to the shipping carrier's website. If there is a problem with your tracking number please contact us. Please allow 1 - 4 days for the tracking information to show up. In some rare case, the tracking information may not update but you will still receive your order. Please contact us after the estimated delivery time.

I think my package was stolen? What do I do now?

The Grounding Co is not responsible for lost or stolen packages. The carrier will generally determine if your order can be left in a safe secure place at your delivery address. Please read our refund policy.

Can I cancel my order?

Please review your items carefully before completing your orders. The Grounding Co order process is automated to distribute products quickly and accurately. All cancellations must be requested via email with order number within 24 hours of placing the order. Please note we cannot guarantee the order will be cancelled if after the 24 hour period.

Can I buy multiple products in a single order?

Sure you can! Just add all the products you want to your shopping bag and then click on the "Checkout" button located inside the cart. Navigate through the cart by clicking on the top right bag icon and scroll down to "Checkout". This way you can save on any additional items and save time.

I received an email saying that I have to verify my order details. What does that mean?

We have a very secure and smart payment system. If our system detects that your order is a potential high risk, we will place your order on hold. Our team will reach out to you to verify the details of your order. We place priority on your and the companies safety and handle all confidential details with the utmost care.

If we cannot verify details within 24 hours, the processor will automatically cancel the order and refund the card used.

Will I receive my items in one package?

For logistical reasons, items in the same purchase will sometimes be sent in separate packages to ensure quality in packaging and for weight distribution, even if you've specified combined shipping. Please keep this in mind when receiving deliveries. If you have any questions please contact us.

What are you waiting for?

Your best sleep ever is just a click away.

Who Should Use Terra Grounding Sheets? 

If you can relate to any of these, then the Terra Grounding Sheets were made for you:


  • You toss and turn for hours each night, unable to quiet your mind and body for deep, peaceful sleep

  • You wake up feeling more exhausted than when you went to bed, as if you never fully recharged

  • Chronic aches, pains and stiffness greet you each morning, making starting your day a challenge

  • Your energy levels have plummeted over the years, leaving you drained and depleted

  • Persistent brain fog and lack of focus make you feel like you've lost your mental edge

  • You're worried about the long-term effects of chronic inflammation and oxidative stress on your body


The Terra Grounding Sheets are perfect for health-conscious biohackers seeking cutting-edge sleep upgrades, seniors looking to recapture their youthful vitality, and anyone in between who craves the uninterrupted, rejuvenating sleep their body deserves.


This isn't for those lucky few who already bounce out of bed each morning bursting with energy. If you've never struggled with sleep issues, chronic pain or premature aging, congratulations! But you likely don't need the cellular-level recharging the Terra Grounding Sheets provide.


However, if you're tired of feeling older than your years and are ready to experience just how good your body is designed to feel with the right electrical balance - the Terra Grounding Sheets are your new sleep secret weapon.


Imagine how much more you'll accomplish when you wake up recharged and refreshed, ready to take on the day with a clear mind and pain-free body. How much more will you enjoy your time with loved ones and favorite activities when your energy levels seem boundless?


Stop accepting subpar sleep and nagging pains as your "new normal." You deserve so much more - and it starts with grounding your body to the Earth's natural healing power each night. Join the 168,000 people rediscovering how incredibly good they're meant to feel!

YES, I'M READY TO SLEEP LIKE I'M 20 AGAIN!
